name: Maze Trials
short_description: Master an endless descent into massive, procedurally generated mazes. Use markers to find your way, collect coins, and race the clock to find the portal. Each exit only leads to a new labyrinth. It's a pure test of navigation and endurance—how deep can you go?
detailed_description:
The Labyrinth is infinite, and it calls to you.

Dive headfirst into a new, procedurally generated maze every time you play. These aren't just simple puzzles; they are sprawling, complex worlds of winding corridors and dead ends, stretching up to a massive 7000x5700 in size. Your only goal is to find the exit. But escape is temporary, leading only to another, more daunting challenge.

Before each descent, you are granted a five-second overview—a fleeting chance to plot your course. Armed with the ability to place markers, you must navigate the twisting paths, collect valuable coins, and race against the clock. As the minutes tick by, the pressure mounts. Can you find the portal before you are lost forever?

Features:

  • Truly Endless Mazes: With procedural generation, no two runs are ever the same. A new challenge awaits you every single time.

  • Massive, Sprawling Scale: Navigate colossal mazes that will test your memory and sense of direction to their absolute limits.

  • Strategic Gameplay: Use the 5-second overview to find a potential path and place markers to track your progress, mark intersections, or signal dead ends.

  • Race Against the Clock: A persistent timer tracks your performance on each level. The longer you take, the more intense it gets.

  • Track Your Progress: A save system automatically records your total mazes completed, coins collected.

  • Atmospheric Experience: A dynamic soundtrack sets the mood for your tense, solitary journey.

The Labyrinth awaits. How many levels can you conquer?
